Classification Uncertainty Histogram

Source: R/09_visualization.R
dot-plot_uncertainty.Rd

Displays the distribution of maximum posterior probabilities across observations. A peak near 1.0 indicates confident classification; mass near 1/K indicates substantial ambiguity.

Usage

.plot_uncertainty(model, ...)

Arguments

model

A mixLCA object.

...

Additional arguments passed to geom_histogram (e.g. bins, binwidth).

Value

A ggplot object.
